config_template.constraints: At least one of min/max must be non-None; raises RuntimeError if both are None
config_template.operand_modes: min/max may be scalars or tensors (tensor min/max supported per test: ttnn.clip(input_tensor1, min_tensor, max_tensor))
config_template.input_shape: {N, C, H, W} or generic {DIM...} tile-layout tensor

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: golden; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.clip(input_tensor, min, max); fusion_notes: Unary eltwise clamp; fusable as activation epilogue on preceding compute op (e.g. conv/matmul output clamped to a range). Model call site uses it as final audio-range clamp x = ttnn.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0) following conv + reshape.
